description: You are a Principal Investigator formatting a Phase I Cultural Resource Management (CRM) survey report. Format the raw field notes at ~/Documents/raw_phase_i_survey.docx into a formal SHPO-compliant report. The document must include a bold, red, centered warning 'CONFIDENTIAL - CONTAINS ARCHAEOLOGICAL SITE LOCATIONS' at the top. Apply 'Title' style to the report title 'Phase I Archaeological Survey of the Proposed Route 47 Expansion Project' and 'Heading 1' style to the seven major section titles. Italicize the scientific names (Pinus taeda, Quercus alba, Odocoileus virginianus, Meleagris gallopavo) in the Environmental Setting section. Convert the Shovel Test Pit (STP) data log into a table with five columns (Transect, STP No., Depth (cm), Stratigraphy, Cultural Material) and the Artifact Catalog into a table with five columns (Catalog No., Context, Count, Material, Description), ensuring both have bold header rows. Apply hanging indents to all bibliographic entries in the References Cited section. Save the formatted report to ~/Documents/results/phase_i_report_formatted.docx.
